chunks.text: DMCC is the world's premier commodities free zone, hosting 26,000+ member companies from 180+ countries with 900+ licensed activities. Headquartered at Almas Tower in Jumeirah Lake Towers (JLT), DMCC operates 87 towers and supports roughly 90,000 professionals.

Strategic priorities 2025–2030: deepen commodities leadership (gold, diamonds, tea, coffee, agri), scale member services excellence, formalise DMCC Cyber and digital assets, activate Uptown Dubai, and lead global trade discourse through Future of Trade.
Ecosystems: Gold & Precious Metals, Diamonds, Crypto & Digital Assets, AI & Technology, and FinX / Foundations Framework for wealth structuring. Tagline: Where the world does business.
Ahmed Bin Sulayem is Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of DMCC. Leadership tone: authoritative, globally connected, trade-forward, and commercially precise.

DMCC values: integrity in member and regulatory dealings; cooperation across 180+ nationalities; agility in trade disruption; creativity in ecosystem design; humility measured by value created for members and Dubai.
Gold ecosystem member growth +12% YoY. Dubai Precious Metals Conference remains a flagship convening platform. DMCC Good Delivery standards continue to underpin international market confidence.

Active rough and polished trading corridors remain healthy. Leadership priority: reinforce precious metals custody and refining partnerships while monitoring lab-grown and digital gold product innovation.

chunks.docTitle: Crypto & Digital Assets — DMCC Cyber Strategy
chunks.text: DMCC Cyber formalises a technology ecosystem of 4,000+ companies. The Tether MoU advances blockchain collaboration and tokenisation use cases for commodities and trade finance.

chunks.docTitle: Crypto & Digital Assets — DMCC Cyber Strategy
chunks.text: BlockDown Dubai 2027 is planned at Uptown Dubai with EAK Digital. Competitive context: ADGM and DIFC continue expanding digital asset frameworks — DMCC differentiates on commodities depth plus crypto licensing at member scale.
Dubai diamond trade reached a record USD 41.7B in 2025. Dubai Diamond Exchange hosted multiple rough tenders; lab-grown diamond share reached approximately 18% of traded volume.
London Diamond Bourse MoU strengthens Dubai–London corridor connectivity. Eight active rough tenders QTD. Dubai Diamond Conference remains the flagship annual convening for the ecosystem.

chunks.docTitle: Dubai Diamond Conference 2026 — CEO Keynote Brief
chunks.text: Dubai Diamond Conference 2026 is scheduled for 26 October. CEO keynote confirmation is a live leadership action. Talking points should align Future of Trade 2026 with Dubai's diamond trade leadership.

chunks.docTitle: Dubai Diamond Conference 2026 — CEO Keynote Brief
chunks.text: Recommended narrative: Dubai as the world's leading diamond trading hub; USD 41.7B 2025 volume; South-South trade architecture; DMCC as convenor of markets, members, and policy.

chunks.docTitle: Future of Trade 2026 — Portfolio Alignment Tracker
chunks.text: Future of Trade alignment score 86/100 for DMCC initiatives. Strong fit: commodities depth, member network effects, FDI contribution (~15% of Dubai FDI), and thought leadership via the Commodity Trade Index — UAE ranked #2 globally.

chunks.docTitle: Future of Trade 2026 — Portfolio Alignment Tracker
chunks.text: Priority actions: Singapore Future of Trade launch 15 Jul; Uptown Dubai investor briefing; DMCC Cyber communications; corporate tax member advisory. South-South trade share at 35% is a core narrative point.

chunks.docTitle: UAE Corporate Tax — Free Zone Qualifying Income Framework
chunks.text: Under Federal Decree-Law No. 47 of 2022, DMCC holds confirmed qualified free zone status. Member communications on qualifying income criteria are due within 14 days. Finance and Legal must align advisory templates before release.

chunks.docTitle: UAE Corporate Tax — Free Zone Qualifying Income Framework
chunks.text: 0% corporate tax rate applies to qualifying free zone income when substance and qualifying activity tests are met. Non-qualifying income is taxed at the standard federal rate. Escalate unclear cases via Legal & Compliance.
